OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

TWEETFEED_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: Score applied to imported data, from 0 (Unknown) to 100 (Fully trusted).

TWEETFEED_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: Whether to create indicators from the imported IOCs.

TWEETFEED_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: Whether to create observables from the imported IOCs.

TWEETFEED_INTERVAL.description: Interval, in days, between two runs of the connector.

TWEETFEED_UPDATE_EXISTING_DATA.description: Whether to update data already present in OpenCTI.

TWEETFEED_ORG_NAME.description: Name of the author organization created in OpenCTI.

TWEETFEED_ORG_DESCRIPTION.description: Description of the author organization created in OpenCTI.

TWEETFEED_DAYS_BACK_IN_TIME.description: Number of days to retrieve data back in time.
